title: blandfordia grandiflora var. backhousii
intro: Blandfordia grandiflora var. backhousii is a variant of the Blandfordia grandiflora, a species of flowering plant native to the eastern coast of Australia. The plant's flowers, leaves, and roots have been traditionally used in Aboriginal medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of the plant include relief from rheumatic pain, fever reduction, and treatment of skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Blandfordia grandiflora var. backhousii include infusions of the leaves and roots, which can be made into teas or tinctures for medicinal use.
